style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails swirl upward in a slow, hypnotic dance around Mewtwo, each particle refracting soft pastel hues of lavender and pearl. A delicate petal-shaped aura pulses gently, emitting a warm, ethereal glow in pale mint and blush pink that softens the surrounding air with subtle musical note vibrations. The lighting mood is serene and otherworldly, bathed in a gentle, diffused glow that mimics moonlight filtering through cherry blossoms. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
